summary: Made two surgical seam edits to strengthen the handoff from Chapter 11's Mercer-yard aftermath into Chapter 12's opening and to point Chapter 12's ending more cleanly toward Monday at the Ashdowns before Mercer.
edits: Revised the opening sentence to anchor Sunday's unease more directly in the Mercer-yard aftermath and Noor's new knowledge.
Adjusted the final sentence to bridge more cleanly into the next chapter's Ashdowns-house setting on Monday morning.
